---
title: 'test4Folder'
page-layout: full
listing:
  id: category-listing
  contents: publish/test4Folder
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: false
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
---

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED-CATEGORY-PAGE: edit folders/posts in Obsidian, not this file. -->

:::{#category-listing}
:::
